# Launch Screen Assets

Curel launch images.

Replace the image files in this directory to customize the launch screen:
- `LaunchImage.png` — standard resolution
- `LaunchImage@2x.png` — 2x resolution
- `LaunchImage@3x.png` — 3x resolution

Alternatively, open `ios/Runner.xcworkspace` in Xcode, select `Runner/Assets.xcassets`, and drag in the desired images.
